name: Adaptive Capitulation: A Structural Failure Mode of LLM Responses in Vulnerability Contexts
summary: arXiv:2607.19629v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language models operating in emotionally sensitive contexts face a structural trilemma: when users in vulnerable states request information t...
description: arXiv:2607.19629v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language models operating in emotionally sensitive contexts face a structural trilemma: when users in vulnerable states request information that may reinforce maladaptive attribution, current response architectures resolve the tension through protective restriction, uninflected facilitation, or unintegrated co-presence of both imperatives...
author: Eunna Lee
